title: Would Evangelion 64 be worth purchasing
wikitext:
[]: Would Evangelion 64 be worth purchasing?             Quote Post by Tabrys » Fri Jan 09, 2015 10:52 am I was thinking about getting the N64 game since it looked decent, and I could just swap the Japanese back for an American cartridge back. Does anyone have recommendations for better games, or are they even worth the money?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 09, 2015 12:33 pm I have the entire Saturn library, they're all pretty much unplayable without knowing Japanese. I do have Evangelion 64, and my assessment is that it's the easiest to import/play. Enjoyable? Not sure, but this review will help you make that determination: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IQxYiJ8vUxI

[]:             Quote Post by Tabrys » Fri Jan 09, 2015 12:47 pm Okay, I think it looks good enough to pick up. Thanks for the help.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jan 09, 2015 4:23 pm Let us know how this goes. Can't play any of my Eva games (except a fan translation of GoS I have to install), but that wasn't the point of picking them up.
